news.title: Where we've been. Where we're headed. at Consensus yesterday. won't bring it back, will! Since onboarding to OpenSea Mobile, I've been thoroughly impressed with a multitude of updates they've pushed. But none have made my collector heart quite as happy as this one! OS PFP by the wonderful Lisbon is getting a new mural. ’s iconic “THE DOOMED” Made possible by Trading feels this easy now on Mobile  ...
Joining OpenSea's Flagship Collection… Normies by — fully on-chain, CC0 generative faces, each one a 40×40 monochrome bitmap rendered as SVG directly from an Ethereum smart contract. More below

6529 ~1 month old  Some of you know me from somewhere else  My views on NFTs in the thread below 1/ On How Short Life Is A few years ago, I was walking around in a blizzard in SoHo (New York). It was late, midnight, and it was beautiful. Some friends, about 15 blocks away, called: "come over?" It was late, it was cold, was tired, thought "maybe not worth it" but then... 1/ There are no other const...

! Below are the facts & my conclusion  RT to spread awareness Read on ... Two 20 year old NFT rugpullers getting charged with wire fraud and money laundering, which both carry a maximum sentence of 20 years in prison So reporting to CI actually does work. Maybe we should send some more names their way. WAGMI Ledger co-founder and former CEO admits that governments can subpoena access to your funds...

Okay I’m not doing this obnoxious shit. I’ll just say it. This is embarrassing for the United States n making me regret my vote. MELANIA TRUMP The Official Melania Meme is live! You can buy $MELANIA now.melaniameme.com FUAfBo2jgks6gB4Z4LfZkqSZgzNucisEHqnNebaRxM1P So I’ve been working with my likely meme coin drop team. We’ve come up with a way to do the drop so the coins is spread EQUALLY across 1...

It was incredible to be able to speak about our industry and how Donald Trump plans on making America the "Crypto Capital of the world”. 32:08 Look mom, I just interviewed ! What an honour. Thank you Mr. President, and thank you to everyone who helped make this happen. This experience has been life changing, and I am looking...

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
